vocab.meaning: trạng thái suy tư tĩnh lặng một mình
vocab.example: I often drifted into a solitary contemplative state while building scale models in my room.

vocab.meaning: sự tương tác và biến đổi trong nhóm
vocab.example: I was fascinated by group dynamics even as a kid, which is why I loved playing team-based strategy games.

vocab.meaning: vui chơi tự lập / tự chủ
vocab.example: My parents encouraged autonomous play, allowing me to develop a strong sense of independence early on.
Organizing neighborhood hide-and-seek matches fostered a great sense of social cohesion among us children.

vocab.meaning: nạp lại năng lượng (thông qua việc ở một mình)
vocab.example: After a hectic day at school, I needed to retreat to my garden to recharge my batteries in silence.
Building a community garden with other kids in the apartment complex really boosted our collaborative spirit.

vocab.meaning: tự lập, không cần sự giúp đỡ hay bầu bạn của người khác
vocab.example: I was a very self-contained child, perfectly happy to spend an entire afternoon painting by myself.

vocab.meaning: vòng tròn xã hội năng động/náo nhiệt
vocab.example: Growing up in a large extended family meant I always had a vibrant social circle of cousins to play with.

vocab.meaning: sự tập trung không bị gián đoạn
vocab.example: I preferred solo activities like reading because I craved the uninterrupted focus that group settings lacked.

vocab.meaning: một sự nỗ lực/hoạt động mang tính tập thể
vocab.example: Putting on a small play for our parents was a collective endeavor that required everyone’s participation.
